name: FFT Periodic Spacing Measurement
description: Perform Fourier-domain analysis on a transmission electron microscopy (TEM) image to determine pore periodicity. Open the built-in 'TEM Filter Plug' sample image in Fiji (File > Open Samples > TEM Filter Plug). Compute the 2D Fast Fourier Transform (FFT) to generate a power spectrum. Measure the distance (in pixels) from the center of the FFT spectrum to the dominant spatial frequency peaks. Calculate the real-space pore spacing using the formula: Spacing = Image_Width / Peak_Distance_From_Center. Save the FFT power spectrum image to ~/ImageJ_Data/results/fft_power_spectrum.tif (or .png) and save a report to ~/ImageJ_Data/results/fft_periodicity_report.csv containing the measured 'Dominant_Period' in pixels and the 'Image_Width' used for calculation.
